shellCommands.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio

async def child():
    try:
        await asyncio.sleep(10)
    finally:
        print('child cleanup')

async def main():
    t = asyncio.create_task(child())
    await asyncio.sleep(0)
    t.cancel()
    try:
        await t
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        print('caught')
        await asyncio.sleep(0)
        print('after await in except')

asyncio.run(main())
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio

async def main():
    try:
        raise asyncio.CancelledError
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        print('caught')
        await asyncio.sleep(0)
        print('after await')

asyncio.run(main())
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio

async def child(i, started, finished):
    started.append(i)
    try:
        await asyncio.sleep(0.2)
    finally:
        finished.append(i)

async def main():
    started=[]; finished=[]
    async def run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent):
        import run
        await run.run_tasks(tasks, max_concurrent)
    tasks=[lambda i=i: child(i, started, finished) for i in range(5)]
    t=asyncio.create_task(run_tasks(tasks, 2))
    await asyncio.sleep(0.05)
    t.cancel()
    try:
        await t
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        pass
    await asyncio.sleep(0.3)
    print('started', started)
    print('finished', finished)

asyncio.run(main())
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
import run

started=[]
finished=[]

async def child(i):
    started.append(i)
    try:
        await asyncio.sleep(0.2)
    finally:
        finished.append(i)

async def main():
    tasks=[lambda i=i: child(i) for i in range(5)]
    t=asyncio.create_task(run.run_tasks(tasks, 2))
    await asyncio.sleep(0.05)
    t.cancel()
    try:
        await t
    except asyncio.CancelledError:
        pass
    await asyncio.sleep(0.3)
    print(started)
    print(finished)

asyncio.run(main())
PY"
